error: Rust has no postfix increment operator
 --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gemma-3-12b/gcc_c11_tests/c11-generic-1/sample_001/target.rs:4:12
  |
4 |     check(n++);
  |            ^^ not a valid postfix operator
  |
help: use `+= 1` instead
  |
4 -     check(n++);
4 +     check({ let tmp = n; n += 1; tmp });
  |
